title: How long does it take to rebuild after an Angel attack
display_title: How long does it take to rebuild after an Angel attack
wikitext:
[]: How long does it take to rebuild after an Angel attack?             Quote Post by Radical Lanzar » Fri Feb 10, 2012 9:28 pm I know NERV can reconfigure it's internal departments to be up and running within 12 hours-ish if an Angel attacks. However, how long does it take to actually rebuild all of HQ/area of attack? Was this ever mentioned?

[]: Re: How long does it take to rebuild after an Angel attack?             Quote Post by svenge » Fri Feb 10, 2012 9:45 pm Radical Lanzar wrote: I know NERV can reconfigure it's internal departments to be up and running within 12 hours-ish if an Angel attacks. However, how long does it take to actually rebuild all of HQ/area of attack? Was this ever mentioned?

[]:             Quote Post by Stryker » Fri Feb 10, 2012 9:53 pm So, in the case of Sachiel: Three Weeks. ...That is really fast.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Sat Feb 11, 2012 3:14 am Stryker wrote: So, in the case of Sachiel: Three Weeks.

[]:             Quote Post by Radical Lanzar » Sat Feb 11, 2012 4:20 am Sachi wrote: Japan is quite good at repairing its infrastructure nowadays. Imagine what it's like in a militarized city that expects to have to rebuild sections regularly.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Feb 11, 2012 4:59 am Sachi wrote: Japan is quite good at repairing its infrastructure nowadays.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Sat Feb 11, 2012 2:24 pm Radical Lanzar wrote: What I'm thinking is NERV's limited to repairs is limited to budget if anything. [Edit] They're ALWAYS complaining about the budget in this show.

[]:             Quote Post by liquidus118 » Sat Feb 11, 2012 6:45 pm A lot longer than the time they have available. The entire city is pretty much destroyed by the end and for quite a while before that it had been almost completely abandoned by civilians. In episode 23/24 we see the NERV pyramid being rebuilt from the attack from Zeruel in episode 19. The scene in episode 24 when Shinji is staring out at the new river shows just how much of it has been destroyed and Shinji even says that there isn't much left if I recall correctly. NERV HQ itself rarely gets attacked directly, besides Ramiel (sort of) and Zeruel.

[]:             Quote Post by Fireball » Sat Feb 11, 2012 7:28 pm When I was a kid I once kicked into an ant nest and completely destroyed it. A day later everything was back as though nothing had happened. It was fascinating. Don't underestimate the diligence of great numbers. Like liquidus said, you can actually see the progress of the story by the wrecked environment. The fiercer and more frequent the attacks become the more destruction can be seen.

[]:             Quote Post by CJD » Sun Feb 12, 2012 7:10 am Fireball wrote: The fiercer and more frequent the attacks become the more destruction can be seen.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Feb 12, 2012 11:31 am Sachi wrote: this area wasn't scheduled to be repaired, and they simply made another lake out of it.
